final:
module top_module(
    input clk, reset, set, clear,
    input data_in,
    output reg data_out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        data_out <= 0;
    end else if (set) begin
        data_out <= 1;
    end else if (clear) begin
        data_out <= 0;
    end else begin
        data_out <= data_out;
    end
end

endmodule
